(second bot coming in a sec)

Man with silverhair and too much arrogance...are we suprised...?

I am not coding that he calls us kitten btw, ew. We'll work with sweetie, darling, and sweetheart instead 😍

Any LND bots I make will probably be AUs cause I do not understand ANY of the lore in this game I fear 😭

If anyone wants to explain it to me feel free, but anyways most of these will probably be an AU of some sort 😗

+ Apologies if he's personality is a bit off, I only just started playing and idk how much about Sylus is out yet 😭

Expect Zayne too because that man is every Asian mother's wet dream.
